rationale: FY27 EPS estimate increased 12%; the stock trades at 24x forward P/E versus a 28x base-case multiple.
bearCase: US discretionary technology spending slows and constant-currency growth remains below 4% for two quarters.
thesisInvalidation: Two quarters below 4% constant-currency growth with EBIT margin below 19%.
exitConditions: Trim at the target value or exit when an invalidation condition is met.
